title: Sagemind AI — Proposal for Dempsey Construction
markdown:
# Sagemind AI — Proposal for Dempsey Construction

**AI-Powered Data Integration: Procore + Monday.com**

---

**Prepared for:** Dempsey Construction
**Prepared by:** Justin Headley, Sagemind AI LLC
**Date:** March 18, 2026
**Version:** 1.0

---

## The Challenge

Dempsey Construction operates across multiple platforms — Procore for project management, Monday.com for task management, CRM, and cross-department coordination, and an on-premise server for file storage. Each system holds critical project data, but they don't talk to each other.

The result:
- **Double entry** — the same information updated independently across systems, often outdated or inconsistent
- **Departmental silos** — pre-construction, construction, and project management each maintain their own boards and workflows without a shared view
- **Time lost searching** — field and office teams spend significant time switching between platforms to find accurate, up-to-date information
- **No unified intelligence** — no single place to ask a question and get an answer that spans all your systems

## The Solution

We propose building a **custom AI assistant** powered by ChatGPT that connects directly to Dempsey's Procore and Monday.com accounts. Your team will be able to open ChatGPT — a tool you already use — and have a conversation with your project data.

**Examples of what your team will be able to do:**

- *"What's the status of the Smith project RFIs in Procore?"*
- *"Show me all open submittals due this week"*
- *"What does the Monday board say about the Johnson project timeline vs. what's in Procore?"*
- *"Give me a summary of all active projects across pre-con and construction"*
- *"Which projects have budget items over $50K that haven't been updated in 30 days?"*

This isn't a new platform to learn. It's the tool you already know, supercharged with access to your actual data.

---

## Why Now

### The Market Has Shifted in Your Favor

You evaluated Trunk Tools and found the functionality compelling but the cost prohibitive. Since then, two things have changed:

1. **Trunk Tools lost access to Procore's API** (September 2025) — Procore revoked their integration over data usage concerns and launched competing AI features. Trunk Tools can no longer integrate with your primary project management system.

2. **Monday.com released a native ChatGPT connector** — Monday.com now offers a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that connects directly to ChatGPT, making integration faster and more reliable than ever.

These shifts create a window where a custom-built solution delivers more capability than enterprise SaaS products — at a fraction of the cost, with no vendor lock-in.

---

## Phase 1 Scope: Data Access & Search

### What's Included

**Procore Integration (Custom GPT Action)**
- Search and discuss RFIs — full details, status, assignees, responses
- Search and discuss submittals — status, spec sections, reviewers, due dates
- Browse project directory — companies, contacts, roles
- View project schedules and milestones
- Access daily logs and field reports
- Search documents and specifications (metadata and content)

**Monday.com Integration (MCP + Custom GPT Action)**
- Query across all connected boards — CRM, pre-construction, construction, project management
- Read item details, statuses, assignments, timelines, and budgets
- Cross-department visibility — see the full picture across boards
- Search by project, person, status, date range, or custom criteria
- Access subitems and nested data (up to 5 levels)

**Cross-Platform Intelligence**
- Ask questions that span both Procore and Monday.com in a single conversation
- Compare timelines, statuses, and budgets across systems
- Unified project summaries pulling from all connected sources

**ChatGPT Environment Setup**
- Custom GPT configured with Procore and Monday.com integrations
- System prompts tailored to Dempsey's terminology and workflows
- Access controls configured for your team
- Guidance on ChatGPT plan selection and account setup

**Documentation & Training**
- User guide for the team
- Admin guide for managing the integration
- Live walkthrough session with your pilot group

### What's Not Included (Future Phases)
- Write-back actions (creating RFIs, updating statuses automatically)
- On-premise server integration
- Drawing/document AI analysis (vision-based)
- Automated workflows and scheduled reports
- Monday.com ↔ Procore auto-sync

---

## Investment

### Phase 1: $15,000 (Fixed Price)

Structured as three milestones:

| Milestone | Deliverable | Payment |
|-----------|-------------|---------|
| **1. Discovery & Setup** | Technical assessment confirming integration viability. Procore API access configured, Monday.com boards mapped, ChatGPT environment set up. Recommendation on ChatGPT plan. | **$5,000** (due on kickoff) |
| **2. Core Integration** | Working Procore + Monday.com Custom GPT demonstrated to your team. You can query both systems from ChatGPT. | **$5,000** (due on demo) |
| **3. Deployment & Handoff** | Team rollout, documentation, training session, and handoff of all credentials and configuration. | **$5,000** (due on completion) |

**What this means for you:**
- You pay as value is delivered — not all upfront, not all at the end
- If something unexpected blocks the build, it surfaces in Milestone 1 before you're deep into it
- Each milestone has a clear deliverable you can verify

### Estimated Timeline
- **Milestone 1:** 1-2 weeks after kickoff
- **Milestone 2:** 2-3 weeks after Milestone 1
- **Milestone 3:** 1 week after Milestone 2
- **Total:** Approximately 4-6 weeks

### ChatGPT Subscription (Your Cost, Separate)
To support Custom GPTs with integrations, Dempsey will need a ChatGPT Team or Enterprise plan:
- **ChatGPT Team:** ~$25-30/user/month — recommended for pilot group (5-10 users)
- **ChatGPT Enterprise:** Custom pricing — recommended if rolling out company-wide

We recommend starting with Team for the pilot group and evaluating Enterprise based on results.

---

## What You'll Need to Provide

| Item | Purpose | When |
|------|---------|------|
| Procore admin access (or API credentials) | Enable integration development | Milestone 1 |
| Monday.com admin access (or API token) | Enable board mapping and integration | Milestone 1 |
| ChatGPT Team/Enterprise account | Host the Custom GPT | Before Milestone 2 |
| 30-minute kickoff call | Align on priorities and board structure | Milestone 1 |
| Pilot group identified (3-5 people) | Initial testing and feedback | Milestone 2 |

---

## Security & Data Handling

We take data security seriously — especially given the sensitivity of construction project data.

**How the integration works:**
- The AI assistant makes **real-time API calls** to Procore and Monday.com on behalf of authenticated users
- **No data is stored** outside of Procore, Monday.com, and ChatGPT's conversation context
- **No bulk downloading** of your data — queries are made on-demand, just like a team member logging in
- **No AI model training** on your data — your project information is not used to train any AI models
- All API connections use **encrypted HTTPS** transport
- Access is controlled through your existing Procore and Monday.com permission systems

**What we will NOT do:**
- Store copies of your project data on external servers
- Share your data with any third party
- Use your data for any purpose beyond powering your AI assistant
- Access your on-premise server without explicit authorization and IT involvement

**Audit trail:** All API activity is logged by Procore and Monday.com's built-in audit systems. You maintain full visibility into what the integration accesses.

---

## Future Roadmap

Phase 1 builds the foundation. Here's where it can go:

### Phase 2: Agentic Capabilities ($10,000-$15,000)
- AI takes actions — creates RFIs, updates statuses, moves items between boards
- Monday.com ↔ Procore auto-sync on key fields
- Automated reporting and project briefings
- Custom workflows triggered by natural language commands

### Phase 3: Deep Intelligence ($10,000-$20,000)
- On-premise server integration (requires IT partnership)
- AI-powered document analysis — drawings, specs, contracts
- Drawing revision comparison and change detection
- Building toward the "AI Project Engineer" — an assistant that handles administrative PM tasks

### Phase 4: Ongoing Support (Optional Retainer)
- Maintenance, updates, and new feature development
- Adapting to platform changes (Procore/Monday.com API updates)
- Expanding to additional team members or use cases
- Estimated: $2,000-$5,000/month depending on scope

Each phase is scoped and priced independently. There is no obligation beyond Phase 1.

---

## Why Sagemind

- **Proven approach** — this integration model is already live and working for another general contractor using Autodesk Construction Cloud and Egnyte
- **Construction context** — we understand PM workflows, RFIs, submittals, schedules, and the cross-department coordination challenges unique to construction
- **Custom-built, not off-the-shelf** — tailored to Dempsey's specific boards, workflows, and terminology
- **No vendor lock-in** — you own the integration. No per-user monthly fees to us. No risk of a vendor losing API access and taking your tool down with them
- **Direct partnership** — you work directly with the person building it, not a support ticket queue

---

## Cost Comparison

| | Trunk Tools (est.) | Sagemind (Phase 1) | Procore Helix (built-in) |
|--|-------------------|-------------------|--------------------------|
| **Year 1 Cost** | $36,000-$120,000 | $15,000 (one-time) | Included but limited |
| **Year 2 Cost** | $36,000-$120,000 | $0 (you own it) | Included but limited |
| **Procore Integration** | Not available | Full access | Native but basic |
| **Monday.com Integration** | Not available | Full access | Not available |
| **Cross-Platform Queries** | No | Yes | No |
| **Customization** | Limited | Full | None |
| **Data Ownership** | Vendor-controlled | You own it | Platform-controlled |

---

## Next Steps

1. **Review this proposal** and discuss internally
2. **Confirm ChatGPT plan direction** (Team recommended for pilot)
3. **Schedule a kickoff call** to align on priorities and begin Milestone 1
4. **Provide access credentials** (Procore admin + Monday.com admin/API token)

We're ready to start as soon as you are.

---
